sampling_notes: Balance SUPPORT/CONTRADICT/NEI ~100 each; require non-empty evidence text.
Sample contrastive triples (claim × {correct, wrong, empty} evidence); 100 claims × 3 evidence variants.
Balance SUPPORTED/REFUTED/NEI ~100 each; optional, not primary.
Balance true/false/mixture/unproven; drop rows with empty evidence.
Sample Supported/Refuted/NEE; hold out Cherry-picking for qualitative review only.
